═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🎥 YOUTUBE COMMENT MONITOR - SETUP COMPLETE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Cron Job ID: 114e5c6d-ac8b-47ca-a695-79ac31b5c076
Schedule: Every 30 minutes
Status: READY TO CONFIGURE

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📦 WHAT WAS CREATED
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✅ youtube-monitor.py
   Main monitoring script
   - Monitors Concessa Obvius channel
   - Categorizes comments (Questions, Praise, Spam, Sales)
   - Auto-responds with templates
   - Logs to JSONL format
   
✅ youtube-analytics.py
   Analytics & reporting tool
   - Detailed statistics
   - Category breakdowns
   - Activity timeline
   - Top commenters
   - Recent flagged items
   
✅ youtube-setup.sh
   One-time setup wizard
   - Installs Python dependencies
   - Saves YouTube credentials
   - Sets channel ID environment variable
   
✅ youtube-comments.jsonl
   Comment log (auto-created)
   - JSON Lines format (one comment per line)
   - Timestamp, commenter, text, category, response status
   
✅ Documentation
   - README-YOUTUBE.md (complete guide)
   - YOUTUBE_SETUP.md (detailed setup)
   - YOUTUBE-CHEATSHEET.md (quick reference)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🚀 NEXT STEPS (3 minutes)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. RUN SETUP WIZARD
   ├─ cd ~/.openclaw/workspace
   ├─ chmod +x .cache/youtube-setup.sh
   └─ ./.cache/youtube-setup.sh
   
   This will:
   ✓ Install dependencies (google-auth-oauthlib, google-api-python-client)
   ✓ Save YouTube API credentials
   ✓ Set YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID environment variable
   
2. TEST THE MONITOR
   └─ python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py
   
   Expected output:
   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ 🎥 YouTube Comment Monitor               │
   │ ⏰ 2026-04-19 06:30:15                   │
   │                                         │
   │ 📊 Session Report:                      │
   │    Total processed: X                   │
   │    Auto-responses sent: Y               │
   │    Flagged for review: Z                │
   └─────────────────────────────────────────┘
   
3. VIEW ANALYTICS
   └─ python3 .cache/youtube-analytics.py
   
   Shows detailed report with trends and flagged items

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📋 WHAT YOU NEED TO PROVIDE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. YouTube API Credentials
   ├─ Get from: https://console.cloud.google.com
   ├─ Steps:
   │  ├─ Create new project
   │  ├─ Enable "YouTube Data API v3"
   │  ├─ Create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app)
   │  └─ Download JSON file
   └─ Setup script will copy to: ~/.openclaw/youtube-credentials.json

2. Concessa Obvius Channel ID
   ├─ Format: UC + 22 characters (e.g., UCxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx)
   ├─ Find it:
   │  ├─ Go to the channel
   │  ├─ Click "About"
   │  └─ Look for "Channel ID"
   └─ Setup script will save to shell profile

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
⚙️ HOW IT WORKS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Comment Categories:
┌──────┬──────────┬───────────────────────────────┬─────────────────┐
│ ID   │ Name     │ Examples                      │ Action          │
├──────┼──────────┼───────────────────────────────┼─────────────────┤
│ 1    │ Questions│ "How do I...?", "What's cost?"│ Auto-respond    │
│ 2    │ Praise   │ "Amazing!", "Inspiring"       │ Auto-respond    │
│ 3    │ Spam     │ "Buy crypto!", "MLM"          │ Log only        │
│ 4    │ Sales    │ "Partnership?", "Collab"      │ Flag for review │
└──────┴──────────┴───────────────────────────────┴─────────────────┘

Auto-Response Templates (editable in youtube-monitor.py):
├─ Category 1: "Thanks for the great question! We'd love to help. ..."
└─ Category 2: "Thank you so much! 🙏 Your support means everything..."

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📊 OUTPUT & LOGGING
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Each Run Prints:
├─ Total comments processed
├─ Auto-responses sent
├─ Flagged for review
└─ Cumulative stats

JSONL Log Format (youtube-comments.jsonl):
{
  "timestamp": "2026-04-19T13:30:00+00:00",
  "comment_id": "Zxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "commenter": "John Doe",
  "text": "How do I get started?",
  "category": 1,
  "response_status": "auto_response_queued"
}

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🔧 CUSTOMIZATION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Edit Auto-Response Templates:
├─ File: youtube-monitor.py
├─ Section: TEMPLATES dictionary
└─ Example:
   TEMPLATES = {
       1: "Custom response for questions...",
       2: "Custom response for praise...",
   }

Adjust Categorization Logic:
├─ Function: categorize_comment()
├─ Modify regex patterns to match your needs
└─ Change priority order (spam checks first, then sales, etc.)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
❓ QUICK COMMANDS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Run setup (one-time)
./.cache/youtube-setup.sh

# Run monitor
python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py

# View analytics
python3 .cache/youtube-analytics.py

# Export as JSON
python3 .cache/youtube-analytics.py --json 10

# Export as CSV
python3 .cache/youtube-analytics.py --csv > export.csv

# Check documentation
less .cache/README-YOUTUBE.md

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📖 DOCUMENTATION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

├─ README-YOUTUBE.md ........... Complete guide (start here)
├─ YOUTUBE_SETUP.md ............ Detailed setup & troubleshooting
├─ YOUTUBE-CHEATSHEET.md ....... Quick reference (commands, config)
└─ YOUTUBE-SETUP-SUMMARY.txt ... This file

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
✨ YOU'RE ALL SET!
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

The system is ready to go. Just run the setup script and you're done.

→ ./.cache/youtube-setup.sh

Then check it out:

→ python3 .cache/youtube-monitor.py

Happy monitoring! 🎥
